texto: I try to explain to people that you get the roles that are right when they're right. If you have a nerd character but you're kind of a cool guy, you're probably not going to get the nerd part. The nerd is going to get the nerd part. You know, someone like me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ed Helms: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I try to explain to people that you get the roles that are right when they're right. If you have …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, character, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e people.

texto: My friend and I sang an a cappella rendition of Extreme's 'More Than Words' at one of our football pep rallies in a desperate attempt to look cool. For a while, I wore pink Converse All Stars because I thought it made me seem daring and irreverent.
